## Quality gates

- [ ] `terraform fmt -check -recursive` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes on all changed modules
- [ ] Exemption check CI passes (no expired exemptions, no missing tickets)
- [ ] Python tests pass: `pytest tests/`
- [ ] Ruff linting passes: `ruff check scripts/`
